summary:
Claim: Sealer penetration should not exceed 150 μm according to ISO 6876-2001.  
Evidence: - ISO 6876-2001 specifies a maximum allowable penetration depth of 150 μm. - Exceeding this level risks compromising seal integrity through microleakage.  
Answer: A
